notes.type_correctness: SetupPrerequisite interface correctly uses `bundled?: true` (optional) for backward compat. PathSource union extended with 'bundled'. All signatures match existing patterns.
notes.pattern_adherence: Desktop-mode guard pattern (check SPECRAILS_IS_DESKTOP first, early return) is consistent across resolveStartupPath and augmentPathFromLoginShell. Follows existing module-level diagnostic state pattern.
notes.test_coverage: Desktop mode covered in both path-resolver.test.ts and setup-prerequisites.test.ts — invariants 1 and 3 explicitly tested. Client-side PrerequisitesPanel and InstallInstructionsModal desktop branches not directly unit-tested but covered indirectly.
notes.security: Bundled runtime path from env var is used directly for path construction — no traversal risk since it's set by the Tauri process, not user input. spawnSync uses the bundled path as executable, not user-controlled.
notes.architectural_alignment: Desktop-mode branching is cleanly isolated behind env var gates in server-only modules. Client type extension is additive. Tauri sets env vars before sidecar spawn — correct integration point. No component code changes required.
